calc_df_grouped_stats[source]

calc_df_grouped_stats(df, groupby, variables, nameslist, funcslist)

Calculate the statistics of a dataframe, grouped by a field, given a list of variables and aggregate functions

create a formatted annotation string given the series

class HelloSayer[source]

HelloSayer(to)

Say hello to to using say_hello

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

HelloSayer.say[source]

HelloSayer.say()

Default method to say something

{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
help(HelloSayer)

Help on class HelloSayer in module __main__:

class HelloSayer(builtins.object)
 |  HelloSayer(to)
 |  
 |  Say hello to `to` using `say_hello`
 |  
 |  Methods defined here:
 |  
 |  __init__(self, to)
 |      Initialize self.  See help(type(self)) for accurate signature.
 |  
 |  say(self)
 |      Default method to say something
 |  
 |  ----------------------------------------------------------------------
 |  Data descriptors defined here:
 |  
 |  __dict__
 |      dictionary for instance variables (if defined)
 |  
 |  __weakref__
 |      list of weak references to the object (if defined)
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
o = HelloSayer("Alexis")
o.say()

Alexis
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
o.say()

Alexis
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
o.to

'Alexis'
{% endraw %}
